headline: Sea Slug Named After Cape Verde Football Hero
meta_description: A newly discovered sea slug species has been named after Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha, honoring his World Cup performance against Spain.
summary_short: Marine scientists have named a newly discovered sea slug species after Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha, celebrating his memorable World Cup match.
body:
When a species is discovered and named, it becomes part of scientific history—and occasionally, the naming choice carries a story that bridges the natural world with human achievement. A new sea slug species has been given the name of Cape Verde's goalkeeper Vozinha, recognizing his notable performance during a World Cup match against Spain.

This kind of naming honors both the athlete's accomplishment and brings attention to marine biodiversity. The gesture reflects how science can celebrate cultural moments while also reminding us of the rich variety of life in our oceans. It's a small but meaningful reminder that discovery and recognition can take unexpected and delightful forms.

The naming of species after notable figures helps raise awareness of both the achievement being honored and the scientific work happening beneath the waves. In this case, a talented goalkeeper and a remarkable sea creature now share a connection that will last in the scientific record.
